scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 08 (Surat Yunus).

terms.note: In the poem this often points to the salient word at the end of the Qur'anic phrase under discussion, not merely to an isolated lexical item in abstraction.

terms.english: is relied upon; its counting is adopted
terms.note: Used when the author marks a given place as the accepted or operative counted place for a specified group of verse-counting authorities.
